pill_sales_shifts_q: Is a slow month just us or is the whole neighbourhood pulling back?
pill_demand_cycles_q: How does demand in my area shift across seasons — and how should I plan for it?
pill_market_pulse_q: How is the local food and drink market performing compared to six months ago?
pill_foot_traffic_q: What are the foot traffic patterns in my neighbourhood by day and daypart?
pill_best_streets_q: Which streets or blocks near me have the highest foot traffic for hospitality?
pill_competition_q: How saturated is the food and drink market within 1 km of this location?
pill_cuisine_gaps_q: What cuisine types are underrepresented near me that locals are searching for?
pill_concepts_here_q: Which formats and cuisines are thriving in this neighbourhood?
pill_delivery_trends_q: What delivery categories are growing fastest in my area right now?
pill_salaries_q: What are restaurants near us actually paying for every role?
pill_chef_pay_q: What are head chefs and sous chefs earning at comparable restaurants nearby?
pill_server_wages_q: How have front-of-house wages changed in my area over the past year?
pill_price_gaps_q: How does our menu pricing compare to competitors within 1 km?
pill_lunch_pricing_q: Where does my lunch menu sit price-wise compared to nearby competitors?
pill_drinks_pricing_q: How do my cocktail and wine prices compare to similar bars in the area?
pill_guest_reviews_q: What are the real sentiment themes across our reviews and competitors?
pill_complaints_q: What service issues keep coming up in reviews of places like mine?
pill_five_star_q: What do the top-rated cafes near me have in common according to reviews?
pill_menu_changes_q: Have any competitors near me changed their menu or pricing recently?
pill_new_launches_q: What new concepts have launched in my area in the last 3 months?
pill_new_openings_q: What has opened or closed in my area recently?
pill_closures_q: What has closed nearby recently and what can I learn from it?
pill_format_shifts_q: Are restaurants in my area shifting formats — dine-in to fast-casual, adding delivery?
pill_food_trends_q: What food trends are gaining traction in my market right now?

seo_home_desc: AI market intelligence for restaurants, synthesizing competitor, pricing, guest, delivery, and local market signals into operator-ready answers.
about_home_headline: The market view your restaurant has been missing
about_home_intro: Restaurant operators make critical decisions every day — where to open, how to price, when to hire — too often without a clear view of the market around them at all. Superextra changes that.
about_home_desc: Our AI models synthesize competitor, pricing, guest, delivery, and market signals into an external intelligence layer for your restaurant. Better context behind better decisions.
uc_home_title: The questions you've been asking – answered
ds_home_sub: Reviewed and validated information you can rely on.
uc_market_trends_desc: Track local demand cycles and competitor momentum. Separate venue performance from market movement, so decisions start from signal.
uc_expansion_desc: Evaluate locations with foot traffic, demographics, competition density, and rent data mapped around each site.
uc_concept_desc: Validate new concepts against local signals. See what's working nearby and whether demand supports the idea before buildout.
uc_financial_desc: Project revenue, occupancy, and labor costs against local benchmarks. Spot spend and staffing gaps before they hit margins.
uc_price_desc: Benchmark pricing against nearby competitors. See which price points, channels, and promos are driving results.
uc_sentiment_desc: Connect review signals across venues. See which themes are growing, fading, or unique to a single location before they become ratings.
uc_competitor_desc: Monitor competitor moves as they happen — menu changes, price shifts, new launches, and format pivots. Stay current without relying on word of mouth.
uc_shifts_desc: Track openings, closures, and format changes across the local market. Spot white spaces where demand meets thin competition early.

about_def_headline: The market view restaurants have been missing
about_def_intro: Restaurants make critical decisions every day — where to open, how to price, when to hire — too often without a clear view of the market around them at all. Superextra changes that.
about_def_desc: Our AI models synthesize competitor, pricing, guest, delivery, and market signals into an external intelligence layer for restaurants and the partners around them — from operators to suppliers and tech platforms. Better context behind better decisions.
hero_l_sub: Super local intelligence and competitor benchmarking for the restaurant industry. The extra advantage behind smarter decisions.
hero_feat1_desc: Dozens of public and proprietary sources combined into a single platform. Deeper than any competitor can assemble alone.
hero_feat2_desc: Country, city, area, neighbourhood. Every layer of the market mapped so decisions are grounded at the right level of detail.
hero_feat3_desc: Vast market data distilled into clear, actionable insights and custom reports. Delivered hand-in-hand with our research team.
cta_l_text: See Superextra on a real market question.
onboard_title: See Superextra on a real restaurant decision
onboard_step1_desc: A few details set the demo around the right market, format, and decision.
onboard_step2_desc: The team maps the competitor, pricing, guest, delivery, and location signals that matter for the demo.
onboard_step3_desc: Review a focused intelligence workflow and the reports or agent setup needed for ongoing monitoring.
ds_def_title: Powered by dozens of data sources
ds_def_sub: We aggregate, cross-reference, and validate data from public platforms, proprietary databases, and official registries across every market we cover.
pc_title: Data and insights behind every restaurant decision
pc_market_desc: Restaurant openings and closings, cuisine trends and top-performing venues continuously tracked and benchmarked. With deep narrative reports that turn raw signals into actionable insights.
pc_menu_desc: Trending items, price tracking, competitor menus, delivery markups, and promotional activity across the market.
pc_revenue_desc: Revenue estimates, margin and food cost analysis, seasonality patterns, channel splits, and delivery platform markups.
pc_guest_desc: Review sentiment, local guest preferences, tourist vs local mix, and payment method trends, all derived from real guest data.
pc_ops_desc: Labor pool availability, salary benchmarks, job market activity, staff turnover, commercial rent, and supplier pricing.
pc_location_desc: Measured and projected foot traffic, demographic profiles, purchasing power, and visit time distribution.
pc_marketing_desc: Brand positioning, campaigns, social activity, marketing channels, and platform presence across competitors.
aud_title: Built for all players in the ecosystem
aud_sub: The restaurant industry has many sides. We serve them all.
aud_independent_desc: Compete smarter with the same market intelligence that big chains use. Know your neighborhood better than anyone.
aud_chains_desc: Find your next location, optimize your portfolio, and benchmark each unit against its local market.
aud_suppliers_desc: Identify growth markets, understand restaurant demand, and monitor supply chain pricing with real market data.
aud_tech_desc: Enrich products with hyper-local restaurant data to help customers with planning, operations, and go-to-market.
aud_agencies_desc: Real market data for pitches, strategies, and campaigns. Hyper-local restaurant intelligence on demand.
aud_investors_desc: Evaluate opportunities, perform due diligence, and monitor portfolio performance with institutional-grade market data.
faq_q1: What types of restaurants is Superextra built for?
faq_a1: Superextra is built for every segment of the restaurant industry — from independent operators and fast-casual concepts to fine dining groups and growing multi-unit brands. It's also used by suppliers, tech platforms, agencies, and investors who need restaurant market intelligence.
faq_q2: How is the data collected and how accurate is it?
faq_a2: Superextra aggregates data from dozens of public and proprietary sources including review platforms, delivery apps, foot traffic providers, real estate databases, public filings, and more. AI models cross-reference and validate data continuously to deliver the most accurate picture of the market.
faq_q3: How reliable are the AI agents? Do they hallucinate?
faq_a3: Superextra agents are built to report facts, not generate them. Every insight is grounded in real data. When information isn't available, the agent flags it as missing rather than inventing an answer.
faq_q4: Does Superextra connect to my POS or internal systems?
faq_a4: No — and that's by design. Superextra brings the market data to you, so there's no integration required. Think of it as an external intelligence layer: all the competitive, location, and industry data you need without sharing any of your own.
faq_q5: What markets and geographies are covered?
faq_a5: Superextra is launching with deep coverage in select European markets and expanding rapidly. If you want to check availability for a specific region, reach out to the team.
faq_a6: Extremely. Intelligence is mapped down to precise trade areas, so you can understand the competitive dynamics of your exact neighborhood — not just a city or zip code. That granularity is what makes Superextra different.
faq_q7: Can I benchmark against specific competitors?
faq_a7: Superextra uses cohort-based benchmarking rather than direct competitor comparisons. Performance is measured against relevant peer groups based on cuisine, price point, format, and location — giving a more reliable and statistically meaningful picture than one-to-one comparisons.
faq_a8: Engagement-based pricing tied to the number of locations and depth of intelligence needed. Early access customers get preferential pricing. Reach out to learn more.
ucd_marketing_desc: Benchmark your brand against local competitors. Know which campaigns, channels, and price points are driving results in your market.
ucd_expansion_desc: Evaluate locations with foot traffic, demographics, competition density, and rent data side by side. De-risk every new site decision.
ucd_research_desc: Understand market dynamics, competitive positioning, and emerging white spaces. Continuously monitor shifts so you spot opportunities before anyone else.
ucd_ops_desc: Track how your costs, staffing, and channel performance compare to the local market. Spot inefficiencies before they hit margins.
ucd_financial_desc: Build projections grounded in real revenue benchmarks, occupancy rates, labor costs, and seasonality patterns — not assumptions.
ucd_sales_desc: Find restaurants that match your ideal customer profile, track new openings in your territory, and time your outreach with real demand signals.
ucd_diligence_desc: Verify partners and vet investment opportunities with independent market data — revenue benchmarks, competitive positioning, and local demand signals.
ucd_enrich_desc: Integrate hyper-local restaurant intelligence into your platform via API. Add market context, venue data, and competitive insights to your product.
